title: Will AI Take My Job? | The AI Chronicle: Editors View
description:
Millions of people are asking whether AI will replace their jobs. In this episode of The AI Chronicle — Editors View, we break it down in plain language.

We look at how real jobs are changing — the engineer, the architect, the lawyer, and the teacher — and what that means for you.

Topics covered:
- Why AI takes tasks, not whole jobs
- How engineer, architect, lawyer, and teacher roles are shifting
- Role exposure ranges: which parts of your job are most at risk
- Reskilling: what to learn and where to start
- A simple 3-step action plan you can use today

Subscribe to The AI Chronicle for weekly AI insights.

quotes_used: In 2026, the global conversation around AI has shifted from 'What is it?' to 'How do we live with it.'
role_data_sources: World Economic Forum Future of Jobs Report 2025
provenance.speculative_claims: none — all points framed as directional trends with stated ranges
